summary.health_score_note: Based on 100-item sample (most recently updated issues)

age_health.note: All 100 sampled issues are in 'Active' bucket because the API returns most-recently-updated first. True distribution across all 882 issues would show more aging/stale/zombie issues.

evidence_of_old_issues.title: [功能]: 自动更新完成后清理下载文件？

concerns: 21.8% of closed issues labeled 'inactive' — high auto-closure rate from inactivity bot
No P0/P1 priority labels found; only 'P2' exists (2 closed issues) — priority taxonomy incomplete
9% of open issues have no labels — triage backlog

p2_normal.note: 2 issues found in closed-30d with P2 label — no P2 open issues in current sample

high_engagement.title: [错误]: MCPB（原DXT）文件导入MCP服务器
[功能]: 自动更新完成后清理下载文件

recommendations: Establish P0/P1 label taxonomy to track critical issues formally
Review inactive-bot threshold; 81/100 closed issues in 30d were auto-closed — may be masking real backlog
Avg time-to-close of 40.85 days suggests slow response time; aim for 7 days on BUG/MCP category
Issue #9943 (MCPB import, 15 comments) needs resolution or escalation
